testcase.name: testValidLogin
testcase.system-out:
... ... TestNG 7.9.0 by Cédric Beust (cedric@beust.com) ...
✅ Browser opened! ▶ TC-001: Valid Login Login result: true Page title: frontend Current URL: http://localhost:5173/ecommerce-frontend/ ✅ TC-001 PASSED

You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.18.1` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: testShopNow
testcase.system-out: ✅ Browser closed! ✅ Browser opened! ▶ TC-022: Shop Now Login done, page: <html lang="en"><head> <script type="module">import { injectIntoGlobalHook } from "/ecommerce-frontend/@react-refresh"; injectIntoGlobalHook(window); window.$RefreshReg$ = () => {}; window.$Refres Shop Now not found: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.xpath: //*[contains(text(),'Shop Now')] (tried for 15 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.11' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 148.0.7778.179, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 148.0.7778.178 (d096af1c9e9..., userDataDir: C:\Users\DELL\AppData\Local...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:64834}, goog:processID: 19696, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:64834/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 148.0.7778.179, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 0c5720065a3cba49b37c31235621beed ✅ TC-022 PASSED

testcase.name: testSearch
testcase.system-out: ✅ Browser closed! ✅ Browser opened! ▶ TC-024: Search Login done, page: <html lang="en"><head> <script type="module">import { injectIntoGlobalHook } from "/ecommerce-frontend/@react-refresh"; injectIntoGlobalHook(window); window.$RefreshReg$ = () => {}; window.$Refres Search error: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//button[contains(text(),'🔍') or contains(@class,'search')]"} (Session info: chrome=148.0.7778.179) For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#no-such-element-exception Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.11' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [bee1109056537a0daf8f0160ceecf471, findElement {value=//button[contains(text(),'🔍') or contains(@class,'search')], using=xpath}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 148.0.7778.179, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 148.0.7778.178 (d096af1c9e9..., userDataDir: C:\Users\DELL\AppData\Local...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:51254}, goog:processID: 19316, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:51254/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 148.0.7778.179, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: bee1109056537a0daf8f0160ceecf471 ✅ TC-024 PASSED
